节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: Provides interfaces for initiating location requests, ending the location service, and obtaining the location result cached by the system.

节点.功能描述: Parameters for requesting to report cache location information
Configuring parameters in geo fence requests
Configuring parameters in reverse geocode requests
Indicates latitude information. A positive value indicates north latitude, and a negative value indicates south latitude.
Indicates longitude information. A positive value indicates east longitude , and a negative value indicates west longitude .
Indicates language used for the location description. zh indicates Chinese, and en indicates English.
Indicates the amount of additional descriptive information.
Configuring parameters in current location requests
Indicates latitude information. A positive value indicates north latitude, and a negative value indicates south latitude.
Indicates Longitude information. A positive value indicates east longitude , and a negative value indicates west longitude .
Indicates location timestamp in the UTC format.
Indicates the amount of additional descriptive information.
Indicates operation failure caused by abnormal location switch.
Indicates failed to get the last known location.
